instructions: Evaluate each capability against the product goal and repository evidence. mode=include forces design coverage, mode=exclude records a user override, and mode=auto means include only when justified. Do not add infrastructure merely because it appears in this catalog.

capabilities.name: Users, personas, and primary outcomes
capabilities.description: Identify who uses the product, their main jobs, and measurable outcomes.

capabilities.name: Roles and permissions
capabilities.description: Define user, operator, administrator, and support boundaries.

capabilities.name: Tenant and organization model
capabilities.description: Decide whether data and configuration are personal, organizational, or multi-tenant.

capabilities.name: Onboarding and first-run experience
capabilities.description: Cover account creation, setup, empty states, samples, and activation.

capabilities.name: User and product settings
capabilities.description: Define configurable preferences, defaults, and reset behavior.

capabilities.name: Accessibility
capabilities.description: Address keyboard use, semantics, contrast, assistive technology, and relevant standards.

capabilities.name: Internationalization and localization
capabilities.description: Evaluate languages, locale formatting, time zones, currencies, and right-to-left layouts.

capabilities.name: Notifications and communication preferences
capabilities.description: Evaluate email, SMS, push, in-app notifications, delivery status, and opt-outs.

capabilities.name: Search, filtering, and discovery
capabilities.description: Determine whether users need full-text, faceted, semantic, or simple indexed lookup.

capabilities.name: File upload, media, and document handling
capabilities.description: Cover validation, storage, scanning, processing, previews, quotas, and deletion.

capabilities.name: Authentication and account recovery
capabilities.description: Select sign-in methods, credential lifecycle, recovery, and account deletion.

capabilities.name: Authorization policy
capabilities.description: Define resource-level permissions, ownership checks, and enforcement points.

capabilities.name: Enterprise SSO and directory provisioning
capabilities.description: Evaluate OIDC/SAML, domain controls, SCIM, and enterprise lifecycle needs.

capabilities.name: Multi-factor and step-up authentication
capabilities.description: Evaluate stronger verification for sensitive users and actions.

capabilities.name: Payment gateway
capabilities.description: Evaluate payment collection, provider choice, tokenization, failures, refunds, disputes, and webhook verification.

capabilities.name: Subscriptions, plans, and entitlements
capabilities.description: Define plans, trials, upgrades, downgrades, proration, usage limits, and access enforcement.

capabilities.name: Invoices, tax, and financial records
capabilities.description: Evaluate invoices, receipts, taxes, currencies, reconciliation, and retention.

capabilities.name: Marketplace payouts and commissions
capabilities.description: Evaluate connected accounts, seller verification, split payments, payouts, and platform liability.

capabilities.name: Primary data storage
capabilities.description: Choose storage based on consistency, query, scale, ownership, and operational needs.

capabilities.name: Schema and data migrations
capabilities.description: Plan forward-compatible changes, rollout ordering, backfills, verification, and rollback.

capabilities.name: Backup, restore, and disaster recovery
capabilities.description: Set recovery objectives, backup frequency, restore tests, and ownership.

capabilities.name: Import, export, and portability
capabilities.description: Evaluate bulk ingestion, export formats, user portability, and migration tooling.

capabilities.name: Retention, archival, and deletion
capabilities.description: Define lifecycle rules, legal holds, user deletion, and physical purge behavior.

capabilities.name: Caching and invalidation
capabilities.description: Evaluate whether latency or load justifies caching and define consistency behavior.

capabilities.name: API contracts and compatibility
capabilities.description: Define protocols, schemas, errors, pagination, idempotency, and compatibility policy.

capabilities.name: API and event versioning
capabilities.description: Define evolution, deprecation, compatibility windows, and consumer migration.

capabilities.name: Webhooks and event delivery
capabilities.description: Cover signing, retries, ordering, idempotency, replay, and dead-letter handling.

capabilities.name: Third-party integrations
capabilities.description: Define credentials, quotas, provider failure, fallback, sync, and reconciliation.

capabilities.name: Rate limiting and abuse controls
capabilities.description: Protect capacity and fairness across users, tenants, endpoints, and integrations.

capabilities.name: Configuration and secrets
capabilities.description: Separate environments, validate configuration, rotate secrets, and prevent disclosure.

capabilities.name: Application logging and diagnostics
capabilities.description: Define structured events, levels, correlation, redaction, retention, and access.

capabilities.name: Metrics, dashboards, and alerts
capabilities.description: Identify service and product health signals, alert thresholds, and owners.

capabilities.name: Distributed tracing
capabilities.description: Evaluate request tracing across service or provider boundaries.

capabilities.name: Audit trail
capabilities.description: Identify security- and state-relevant actions, actors, integrity, access, privacy, and retention.

capabilities.name: Health, readiness, and dependency checks
capabilities.description: Define process health, traffic readiness, degraded states, and safe diagnostics.

capabilities.name: Background jobs and scheduling
capabilities.description: Cover durable queues, retries, idempotency, cancellation, visibility, and dead letters.

capabilities.name: Install, packaging, and distribution
capabilities.description: Define artifacts, dependencies, signing, installation, updates, and uninstall behavior.

capabilities.name: Container image
capabilities.description: Evaluate reproducible container builds, image security, runtime configuration, and architecture support.

capabilities.name: Docker Compose deployment
capabilities.description: Evaluate a cohesive local or small self-hosted stack with dependencies, volumes, health checks, and upgrades.

capabilities.name: Container orchestration
capabilities.description: Evaluate Kubernetes or managed orchestration only when scale and operating maturity justify it.

capabilities.name: CI/CD and release promotion
capabilities.description: Define tests, build provenance, environment promotion, approvals, and deployment automation.

capabilities.name: Safe deployment, rollback, and feature flags
capabilities.description: Plan compatibility, progressive rollout, rollback limits, and kill switches.

capabilities.name: Threat model and trust boundaries
capabilities.description: Identify assets, actors, entry points, abuse cases, and mitigations proportionate to risk.

capabilities.name: Encryption and key management
capabilities.description: Evaluate transport protection, encryption at rest, key custody, rotation, and recovery.

capabilities.name: Privacy and consent
capabilities.description: Define data minimization, purpose, consent, disclosure, access, deletion, and processor boundaries.

capabilities.name: Regulatory and contractual compliance
capabilities.description: Evaluate applicable standards, evidence, controls, residency, retention, and validation ownership.

capabilities.name: Failure handling and graceful degradation
capabilities.description: Define timeouts, retries, circuit breaking, fallbacks, partial failure, and user-visible recovery.

capabilities.name: Capacity, scalability, and performance
capabilities.description: Set workload assumptions, bottlenecks, limits, load testing, and scale triggers.

capabilities.name: Availability and disaster objectives
capabilities.description: Define acceptable downtime, recovery time, recovery point, redundancy, and failover.

capabilities.name: Administration and support tools
capabilities.description: Evaluate safe user support, moderation, configuration, investigation, and break-glass actions.

capabilities.name: Product analytics and experimentation
capabilities.description: Define events, consent, funnels, metrics ownership, experiments, and data quality.

capabilities.name: Customer support and feedback
capabilities.description: Evaluate feedback capture, support channels, issue context, privacy, and escalation.

capabilities.name: Offline behavior and synchronization
capabilities.description: Define local state, conflict resolution, retries, staleness, and connectivity transitions.

capabilities.name: Client update compatibility
capabilities.description: Plan forced/optional updates, backend compatibility windows, migration, and rollback.

capabilities.name: Model and prompt lifecycle
capabilities.description: Evaluate model selection, prompt/version tracking, evaluations, fallback, cost, latency, and rollout.

capabilities.name: AI safety and human control
capabilities.description: Define input/output safety, privacy, grounding, uncertainty, review, override, and incident response.

capabilities.name: IoT device lifecycle and edge telemetry
capabilities.description: Evaluate device provisioning, firmware OTA updates, intermittent connectivity, payload optimization, and edge computing.

capabilities.name: Real-time state sync and matchmaking
capabilities.description: Define websocket/WebRTC topologies, latency compensation, tick rates, state resolution, presence, and anti-cheat constraints.

capabilities.name: Audio and video streaming pipelines
capabilities.description: Evaluate encoding, transcoding, adaptive bitrate streaming (HLS/DASH), CDN edge caching, and DRM protection.

capabilities.name: Data pipelines and ETL
capabilities.description: Define batch processing windows, stream processing, data lakes, schema evolution for analytics, and BI tool integration.

capabilities.name: Web3 and smart contract integration
capabilities.description: Evaluate wallet-based authentication, transaction signing, gas fees, indexing on-chain data, and oracle reliance.
